plot outline: Though safely entombed in a crypt deep beneath the unforgiving desert, an ancient princess, whose destiny was unjustly taken from her, is awakened in our current day bringing with her malevolence grown over millennia, and terrors that defy human comprehension.
title: The Mummy
akas: The Mummy: Cursed Princess of the Desert (Japan, English title)
ザ・マミー 呪われた砂漠の王女 (Japan, Japanese title)

other companies.name: International Alliance of Theatrical Stage Employees (IATSE)
